user.name: Armani Banks

tweets.text:
Another win in the books. 🫡🔥

A good day for @VAMVault_.

VAMVault just picked up a Community Award at the 0G APAC Hackathon. 🚀

Congratulations to all the winners, and thank you @0G_labs and @HackQuest_.

We keep building.

#BuildOn0G https://t.co/bvJGyMtwJe
tweets.name: Armani Banks

tweets.text:
A few weeks ago, I was still building Verifiable Agent Memory Vault.

Today, 112 agents have been created, and builders are already applying the same memory layer in ways I never expected.

From Payment Settlement Agents and Helm Risk Allocation Agents to Marketplace Listing https://t.co/x0k9iVblBI https://t.co/4SyY4Mg7vf
tweets.name: Armani Banks

tweets.text:
While building Verifiable Agent Memory Vault, we kept running into the same problem:

Builders understood the idea of verifiable memory.

They weren't always sure where it fit inside an existing agent workflow.

That's an adoption problem.

So we shipped Builder Docs.

Instead of https://t.co/hhc2cGdBxM
tweets.name: Armani Banks

tweets.text:
Another improvement we're working on for Verifiable Agent Memory Vault:

Builder Docs.

The onboarding update focuses on helping builders understand where @VAMVault_ fits within an existing agent workflow.

Builder Docs focuses on helping builders integrate @VAMVault_ into one. https://t.co/vh7WzCfwDw
tweets.name: Armani Banks
